confirmSignup.subject: Confirm your account at ProfeVision
confirmSignup.heading: Welcome to ProfeVision!
confirmSignup.body: Thanks for signing up. Click the button to confirm your email address.
confirmSignup.footer: If you didn't create this account, you can ignore this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.heading: Reset Password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button to continue.
resetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
